com.mentor.chs.plugin.wiringdesigngenerator

Interface IXDiagramPartition


  • public interface IXDiagramPartition
    A functionally partitioned diagram is a diagram generated by CAVAI for the wiring information in an Integrator design applicable to a functional diagram in the functional designs associated with the Integrator design.
    A diagram partition is a further partitioning of a functionally partitioned diagram.
    This class determines the content of the diagram partition.

    The system may process different IXDiagramPartition objects in different threads of execution. Implementations should take care to maintain a thread-safe access to any data that is shared between different objects of this class.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String getName()
      Get the name of this diagram partition.
      void getPropertiesForPartition(IXPropertySetter propertySetter)
      This method updates the passed property setter object with properties and values that have to be created on this diagram partition.
      IXLogicDiagram getPrototypeDiagramForPartition(IXLogicDiagram systemSelectedPrototype, java.util.Collection<IXLogicDiagram> candidatePrototypes)
      This method returns the prototype diagram to be used for this partition.
      boolean isApplicable(IXConnectivityObject connectivityObject)
      This method determines if the specified wiring object is applicable to this diagram partition.

    • Method Detail

      • getName

        java.lang.String getName()
        Get the name of this diagram partition.
        Returns:
        Name of the diagram partition

      • isApplicable

        boolean isApplicable(IXConnectivityObject connectivityObject)
        This method determines if the specified wiring object is applicable to this diagram partition. If the specified object is applicable to this partition, CAVAI may create schematics for the object in this partition depending on CAVAI distribution rules. If the specified wiring object is not applicable to this partition, CAVAI will not create schematics for the object in this partition
        Parameters:
        connectivityObject - A connectivity object in the generated wiring design
        Returns:
        false - Indicates that the specified wiring object is not applicable to this partition
        true Indicates that the specified wiring object is applicable to this partition
        See Also:
        getPrototypeDiagramForPartition(com.mentor.chs.api.IXLogicDiagram, java.util.Collection<com.mentor.chs.api.IXLogicDiagram>)

      • getPropertiesForPartition

        void getPropertiesForPartition(IXPropertySetter propertySetter)
        This method updates the passed property setter object with properties and values that have to be created on this diagram partition.
        Parameters:
        propertySetter - property setter object

      • getPrototypeDiagramForPartition

        IXLogicDiagram getPrototypeDiagramForPartition(IXLogicDiagram systemSelectedPrototype,
                                               java.util.Collection<IXLogicDiagram> candidatePrototypes)
        This method returns the prototype diagram to be used for this partition. The returned diagram should be one of the specified candidate prototypes or the functional diagram of this partition.
        Parameters:
        systemSelectedPrototype - The prototype as determined by the system.
        candidatePrototypes - Array of diagrams from which the method has to determine the diagram to be used as a prototype. The system selected prototype will be present in this collection. The candidate prototype diagrams is a subset of the diagrams in the prototype designs and this subset is determined by the system,
        Returns:
        A diagram that will be used as a prototype for this partition.
        If the returned value is null or if it is not any of the candidate prototypes, the functional diagram of the partition will be used as the prototype for this partition.
